response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration systems, with solid fundamentals in TDD, CI/CD, and distributed services (notably high-throughput work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or growth engineering — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Seniority signals (Staff/Senior titles, founder work) are present but there is limited evidence of architecting cross-team platforms at the scale expected of a Principal IC, and the primary languages (TypeScript, DLang, Node) only partially overlap with the stated stack.
strengths: 13+ years across full-stack, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services (millions of req/s at Sociomantic)
Strong engineering-craft signals: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD, workshops on testing
Polyglot breadth (TypeScript, C/C++, Java, C#, Python-adjacent, DLang) matching the language requirement
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing systems
Lacks evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical/experimental analysis work
No clear track record of Principal-level cross-team platform leadership or growth/measurement systems

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and high-scale service experience
Insufficient evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team architectural leadership
